title: Variables, classes and functions should be defined before being used
description: Declare variables, classes and functions before using them.
message: Variable, class or function is used before being defined.
recommendation: Declare variables, classes and functions at the top of the file or method.

noncompliant.description: Function is called before being defined.

compliant.description: Function is defined before being called.

why_is_this_an_issue: Makes the code more difficult to understand, maintain and test.
how_to_fix: Move the variable, class or function declaration before the usage.
